summary_one_line: A unicode-space codepoint u that is NOT any enumerated case literal (0x0020/0x00A0/0x2006...) so the switch falls to default.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: An input whose decoded codepoint u reaches space_fallback_type but does NOT equal any enumerated switch case literal (0x0020, 0x00A0, 0x2000, 0x2006, 0x3000, ...), so the switch on u takes the `default:` arm at line 224 instead of a `case` arm.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile resolves the default arm in 10/10 trials with hitcount 38 and W reaches line 224 ([W] 224, d=1 L 224 W=T:16/F:1); its CMP_MAP gradient feedback rewards producing unicode-space codepoints that route into space_fallback_type, but lacking I2SRandReplace it is not snapped onto the exact case literals, so non-enumerated space codepoints survive in the corpus and trip the default arm.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile_cmplog blocks the default arm in 10/10 trials with hitcount 0; its I2SRandReplace mutator substitutes the switch comparand u with the exact literal operands of the case comparisons (0x0020, 0x00A0, 0x2006 are exactly the cases its loser seeds land on, [L] 225/226/233, d=1 L 225/226/233), driving every space input onto an enumerated `case` and away from `default`.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: The single technique delta is I2S, present in the loser and absent in the winner. value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient feedback lets it accumulate diverse unicode-space codepoints without forcing exact equality matches; the loser's added input-to-state substitution rewrites u with the exact case-literal operands seen in the switch comparisons, collapsing inputs onto enumerated cases and starving the default arm. The winner's enabling technique is therefore CMP_MAP gradient exploration unhampered by literal-snapping.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the default arm of a switch on the codepoint u, returning NOT_SPACE.
The default arm is the globally blocked true branch and the winner reaches it.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: [W]   224        default:	    return NOT_SPACE;	/* U+1680 OGHAM SPACE MARK */ <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: The enumerated case arms are the literal space codepoints the loser-blocking seeds land on.
At the blocker line, W takes the default (true) side while L does not.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 224  T=16 F=1  T=0 F=12  default:	    return NOT_SPACE;	/* U+1680 OGHAM SPACE MARK */  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile is the winner and value_profile_cmplog the loser, the delta being I2S.
The winner resolves all trials with positive hitcount while the loser is blocked with zero hitcount.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: avg hitcount on branch: winner=38  loser=0

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of the havoc/token stack.
value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient feedback preserves inputs whose CMP operands get closer to matching.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: claimed_mechanism is CMP_MAP gradient (not I2SRandReplace), so lineage dash-row verification is not mandatory. The sole technique delta is I2S, present in the LOSER (value_profile_cmplog) and absent in the WINNER (value_profile); the winner's advantage is CMP_MAP-gradient exploration that is NOT collapsed onto exact case literals by I2S substitution, so no winning-seed I2S floor is expected or required.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic switch whose case literals match the comparand operands would still show value_profile_cmplog resolving the default arm as fast as value_profile (no I2S-induced collapse onto cases), with no significant hitcount gap on the default arm.

weakest_evidence_point: The claim that I2SRandReplace actively pulls vpc onto enumerated case literals (rather than vpc merely being slower for unrelated reasons) is inferred from the source switch structure plus the loser seeds landing on 0x0020/0x00A0/0x2006, not directly observed in lineage.
